notes: AI-assisted HTML edit via template editor
instructions: Add a summary statistics row at the bottom of the table showing the total count of gateways and the number of active vs inactive gateways.
summary: Added a <tfoot> summary row at the bottom of the gateway table displaying total gateway count ({total_gateways}), active count ({active_gateways}), and inactive count ({inactive_gateways})
Active count is styled green and inactive count styled red to match the existing badge color scheme
Added supporting CSS classes: summary-row, summary-stat-label, summary-stat-value, summary-active, and summary-inactive for consistent styling
